Name: Business Case
Description: Why is this important for customers? How will this benefit SMART? If possible, quantify the impact.

Name: Dispositioned Where?
Description:
Where did this idea finally end up?

If ALREADY EXISTS, IMPLEMENTED or PLANNED then provide link to where it can found in Aha!, VSTS or elsewhere - or at least provide reference where that feature, requirement, master feature is on SMART's products.

For FUTURE CONSIDERATION and WILL NOT IMPLEMENT leave blank and Core PM team will determine appropriate home for the idea in a separate ideas grooming session.

Likewise, for NEEDS REVIEW and ADDITIONAL INFORMATION REQUIRED leave this blank. This is an intermediate status and once the landing status for the idea is determined, you can complete this field.

Name: Assumptions
Description: What are the assumptions attached to this request? Could be technical, financial, business etc..

Name: Constraints
Description: Limitations imposed on the solution, could be financial, technical etc..

Name: Category
Description: What product or project does this feedback belong to?

Name: Targeted persona
Description: What are the personas targeted, if applicable

Name: Rationale
Description: Why do you need this change? Is it related to a tender?

Name: Opportunity size
Description: what do you think is the potential revenue, revenue at risk? If known, give more details about the opportunity, like product information, ie Panel(s), if there is an accessory tied to the deal, the qty of units etc..

Name: Timeline
Description: Is it related to a tender or is it attached to a specific deadline?

Name: Use Case
Description: Give the situation in which the customer is when facing this problem or desire.

Name: Frequency
Description: How often is the customer coming against this issue or how often would the customer need this new feature? Low â once per month, Medium â once per week, High â daily.

Name: Competition
Description: Who in the competition do you know is already addressing the need/issue?

Name: Return on Investment
Description: Is the customer willing to pay more for this functionality?
